issue_title: SABnzbd sensors not linked to the integration
issue_body: ### The problem The integration doesn't show any sensors When looking for entities, they do exist. But the integration is sensor, I think this should be sabnzbd. ### What version of Home Assistant Core has the issue? core-2022.5.0 ### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core? n/a ### What type of installation are you running? Home Assistant Container ### Integration causing the issue sabnzbd ### Link to integration documentation on our website https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations/sabnzbd/ ### Diagnostics information n/a ### Example YAML snippet ```yaml n/a ``` ### Anything in the logs that might be useful for us? ```txt Traceback (most recent call last): File "/usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/sabnzbd/sensor.py", line 151, in update_state self._attr_native_value = round(float(self._attr_native_value), 2) TypeError: float() argument must be a string or a number, not 'NoneType' 2022-05-04 20:47:22 ERROR (SyncWorker_6) [homeassistant.util.logging] Exception in update_state when dispatching 'sabnzbd_updated': (None,) Traceback (most recent call last): File "/usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/sabnzbd/sensor.py", line 151, in update_state self._attr_native_value = round(float(self._attr_native_value), 2) TypeError: float() argument must be a string or a number, not 'NoneType' 2022-05-04 20:47:22 ERROR (SyncWorker_1) [homeassistant.util.logging] Exception in update_state when dispatching 'sabnzbd_updated': (None,) Traceback (most recent call last): File "/usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/sabnzbd/sensor.py", line 151, in update_state self._attr_native_value = round(float(self._attr_native_value), 2) TypeError: float() argument must be a string or a number, not 'NoneType' 2022-05-04 20:47:22 ERROR (SyncWorker_10) [homeassistant.util.logging] Exception in update_state when dispatching 'sabnzbd_updated': (None,) Traceback (most recent call last): File "/usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/sabnzbd/sensor.py", line 151, in update_state self._attr_native_value = round(float(self._attr_native_value), 2) TypeError: float() argument must be a string or a number, not 'NoneType' ``` ### Additional information I'm not sure if the log is related to my "issue" or if it is something else. Also, the import of the yaml config failed, I had to manually add it (maybe the logs above are related to that?)
pr_body:
1. add unique id to sensors
2. add a service info

Added unique ids to sensors so the integration will show the entities.
Also added a service info section
